'''âj-ng-l''' ('''kajangal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:histogram|histogram]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ng-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:histogram|histogram]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-ng-l
|-
! Lemma
| kajangal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijangal|thijangal]] || [[word:jijangal|jijangal]] || [[word:shijangal|shijangal]] || [[word:kijangal|kijangal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujangal|thuthujangal]] || [[word:jujujangal|jujujangal]] || [[word:shushujangal|shushujangal]] || [[word:kukujangal|kukujangal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujangal|thujangal]] || [[word:jujangal|jujangal]] || [[word:shujangal|shujangal]] || [[word:kujangal|kujangal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujangal|thujangal]] || [[word:jujangal|jujangal]] || [[word:shujangal|shujangal]] || [[word:kujangal|kujangal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejangal|thejangal]] || [[word:jejangal|jejangal]] || [[word:shejangal|shejangal]] || [[word:kejangal|kejangal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojangal|thothojangal]] || [[word:jojojangal|jojojangal]] || [[word:shoshojangal|shoshojangal]] || [[word:kokojangal|kokojangal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojangal|thojangal]] || [[word:jojangal|jojangal]] || [[word:shojangal|shojangal]] || [[word:kojangal|kojangal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojangal|thojangal]] || [[word:jojangal|jojangal]] || [[word:shojangal|shojangal]] || [[word:kojangal|kojangal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjangal|thĂŠjangal]] || [[word:jĂŠjangal|jĂŠjangal]] || [[word:shĂŠjangal|shĂŠjangal]] || [[word:kĂŠjangal|kĂŠjangal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajangal|thathajangal]] || [[word:jajajangal|jajajangal]] || [[word:shashajangal|shashajangal]] || [[word:kakajangal|kakajangal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajangal|thajangal]] || [[word:jajangal|jajangal]] || [[word:shajangal|shajangal]] || [[word:kajangal|kajangal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajangal|thajangal]] || [[word:jajangal|jajangal]] || [[word:shajangal|shajangal]] || [[word:kajangal|kajangal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajangal|shajangal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajangal|goshajangal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajangal|gokishajangal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajangalnĂŒ|shajangalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajangalnknĂŒ|goshajangalnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajangalnĂŒ|gokishajangalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajangalshĂ«|shajangalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajangalnkshĂ«|goshajangalnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajangalshĂ«|gokishajangalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajangalro|shajangalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajangalnkro|goshajangalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajangalro|gokishajangalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajangalmu|shajangalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajangalnkmu|goshajangalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajangalmu|gokishajangalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajangalsher|shajangalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajangalnksher|goshajangalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajangalsher|gokishajangalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajangalng|shajangalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajangalnkng|goshajangalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajangalng|gokishajangalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajangalya|shajangalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajangalnkya|goshajangalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajangalya|gokishajangalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajangalyam|shajangalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajangalnkyam|goshajangalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajangalyam|gokishajangalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajangalnĂŒshĂ«|shajangalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajangalnknĂŒshĂ«|goshajangalnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajangalnĂŒshĂ«|gokishajangalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajangalnĂŒro|shajangalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajangalnknĂŒro|goshajangalnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajangalnĂŒro|gokishajangalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajangalnĂŒmu|shajangalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajangalnknĂŒmu|goshajangalnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajangalnĂŒmu|gokishajangalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajangalshĂ«nĂŒ|shajangalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajangalnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajangalnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajangalshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajangalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajangalshĂ«ro|shajangalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajangalnkshĂ«ro|goshajangalnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajangalshĂ«ro|gokishajangalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajangalshĂ«mu|shajangalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajangalnkshĂ«mu|goshajangalnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajangalshĂ«mu|gokishajangalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajangalronĂŒ|shajangalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajangalnkronĂŒ|goshajangalnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajangalronĂŒ|gokishajangalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajangalroshĂ«|shajangalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajangalnkroshĂ«|goshajangalnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajangalroshĂ«|gokishajangalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajangalromu|shajangalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajangalnkromu|goshajangalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajangalromu|gokishajangalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajangalmunĂŒ|shajangalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajangalnkmunĂŒ|goshajangalnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajangalmunĂŒ|gokishajangalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajangalmushĂ«|shajangalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajangalnkmushĂ«|goshajangalnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajangalmushĂ«|gokishajangalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajangalmuro|shajangalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajangalnkmuro|goshajangalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajangalmuro|gokishajangalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
